/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zepra-unit-tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/zepra-unit-tests.dir/unit/value_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/zepra-unit-tests.dir/unit/lexer_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/zepra-unit-tests.dir/unit/parser_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/zepra-unit-tests.dir/unit/vm_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/zepra-unit-tests.dir/unit/gc_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/zepra-unit-tests.dir/unit/builtin_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/zepra-unit-tests.dir/unit/url_tests.cpp.o" -o ../../../bin/zepra-unit-tests  ../../../lib/libzepra-core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
